message.content:
- Reports of Ryzen x3d series CPUs burning and dying, leading to firmware updates for AM5 boards
- Google Pixel Fold leaked in a video showing its foldable screen and alleged specs
- Apple's AR/VR headset will reportedly run hundreds of thousands of iPad apps but have a short battery life
- AMD may skip some GPU series launches and go straight to RX 7600
- Twitter is giving check marks to some celebrities without their consent and verifying fraudulent accounts
- Blizzard staff leaving the company, possibly due to work culture policies
- Snapchat's new AI chat bot receiving one-star reviews from users and can only be removed with a subscription
- Augmental developing a wearable track pad called the Mouth Pad for people with quadriplegia.
